gigapan.description:
Gerstle Cove, in Salt Point State Park California.

I spent an afternoon here gigapanning in 2007. I was looking at my notes from this time, and realized that I had stitcher failures back then...a newer (but not the newest :-) Stitcher did a better job than back in those days...
